label: Live Alert Feed
description: Real-time streaming feed of risk alerts with severity, entity, and recommended action per alert.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets.

0.6.note: — SSE-based widget; no isLoading state (connection opens immediately); isConnected indicator serves as status.

0.7.note: Empty state: 'No alerts yet' shown when alertFeed.length===0.

0.8.note: Error/disconnect state: isConnected=false shows 'Disconnected' indicator with muted dot in header; mode guard shows 'Switch to Live mode' when inactive.

0.9.note: No dead code. Prettier applied — minor whitespace reformatting only.

l0.notes: 0.1 WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets. 0.2 requiredEntitlements=[execution-basic,execution-full]. 0.3 availableOn=[risk]. 0.4 No any/ts-ignore. 0.5 No lib/mocks imports. 0.6 N/A — SSE-based widget; no isLoading state (connection opens immediately); isConnected indicator serves as status. 0.7 Empty state: 'No alerts yet' shown when alertFeed.length===0. 0.8 Error/disconnect state: isConnected=false shows 'Disconnected' indicator with muted dot in header; mode guard shows 'Switch to Live mode' when inactive. 0.9 No dead code. Prettier applied — minor whitespace reformatting only.

1.1.note: Data via useRiskAlertNotifications() hook (purpose-built for this widget).

1.2.note: use-risk-alert-notifications.ts calls useGlobalScope() line 38 for mode detection. 1.3-1.5 Live alert feed is mode-gated (live only) not entity-scoped; scope filtering N/A for SSE stream.

1.3.note: 1.5 Live alert feed is mode-gated (live only) not entity-scoped; scope filtering N/A for SSE stream.

1.5.note: Live alert feed is mode-gated (live only) not entity-scoped; scope filtering N/A for SSE stream.

1.6.note: — feed is not entity-filtered (all org alerts surface).

1.7.note: No constants in lib/mocks; SEVERITY_CONFIG is widget-local inline constant (acceptable).

l1.notes: 1.1 Data via useRiskAlertNotifications() hook (purpose-built for this widget). 1.2 use-risk-alert-notifications.ts calls useGlobalScope() line 38 for mode detection. 1.3-1.5 Live alert feed is mode-gated (live only) not entity-scoped; scope filtering N/A for SSE stream. 1.6 N/A — feed is not entity-filtered (all org alerts surface). 1.7 No constants in lib/mocks; SEVERITY_CONFIG is widget-local inline constant (acceptable).

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab and f9f29ea. Re-audit only if wiring test fails or entitlements change.

3.1.note: Applies to: live ✓ ONLY (SSE stream). Paper/batch — N/A. Widget explicitly shows 'Switch to Live mode for real-time alerts' when not active.

3.2.note: useRiskAlertNotifications exposes isActive which reflects live mode. Widget gates all content behind isActive check.

3.5.note: Paper mode: not active — same inactive state as batch. Alert stream is live-only by design.

3.6.note: SSE connection managed by useRiskAlertNotifications hook which checks isActive before connecting. No connection in non-live modes.

l3.notes: Human must verify 3.3 (no order buttons — N/A for this widget), 3.4 (batch indicator in layout) in browser.

4.1.note: clearFeed button calls clearFeed handler from useRiskAlertNotifications — real handler.

4.6.note: No entitlement checks in render path.

l4.notes: Human must verify 4.4 (clear button removes all alerts from feed), 4.8 (WidgetScroll contains alert rows).

5.1.note: Target strategies: all strategies (alert feed is strategy-agnostic — shows CRITICAL/WARNING/INFO alerts from any strategy). strategy_id optionally shown per alert.

7.1.note: No hardcoded hex colors. SEVERITY_STYLES uses Tailwind semantic classes (bg-rose-500/20 etc.), not arbitrary hex values.

7.4.note: RiskLiveAlertFeedWidget PascalCase. formatAlertTime function camelCase. File kebab-case.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: SEVERITY_STYLES is module-level const (stable). No problematic useEffect/useMemo deps.

8.1.note: text-[10px]/text-[9px] replaced with text-micro/text-nano tokens per consolidated globals.css; no arbitrary typography classes remain.

8.3.note: Uses Badge, WidgetScroll shared components. clearFeed uses plain <button> (acceptable here — simple text button with visible label).

8.4.note: Agent: clearFeed <button> has visible text content 'Clear (N)' — accessible. Animate-pulse indicator has adjacent text label. No unlabelled inputs.

8.5.note: Human: resize test at minW=4, minH=3 required.

l8.notes: 8.1 fixed (tokens applied). 8.2-8.4 pass. 8.5 needs human verification.

keepSeparate.rationale: Live-only SSE stream widget; no equivalent widget. Unique real-time alert surface.

relationships.notes: Live-mode only. SSE connection managed by useRiskAlertNotifications hook.

dataContract.notes: useRiskAlertNotifications hook manages SSE subscription to risk alert stream. No mock source — live-only widget.

gaps: No mock data for development/testing — widget is empty in non-live modes
coverage.notes: CRITICAL/WARNING/INFO severity levels. strategy_id optionally shown per alert.

findings.description: Prettier reformatted whitespace (multi-line Badge/span collapsed to single lines) — no logic changes

SSE error event from useRiskAlertStream is not surfaced through useRiskAlertNotifications hook — disconnected indicator covers the UX gap but error details are not shown; low severity since reconnect is automatic
risk-live-alert-feed-widget.tsx — ~10 user-visible strings (mode message, severity labels, status text, clear button)
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: risk-live-alert-feed-widget.tsx — text-[10px], text-[9px] used for alert category, badge, timestamp, and message
findings.fix: Applied text-micro (10px), text-nano (9px), text-caption (11px) tokens per consolidated globals.css; arbitrary text-[Npx] classes removed
